## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Policy amendment
- [ ] Skill or Agent definition change
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure change

## Changed Files Scope

- [ ] Core framework (`.claude/CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] Policies (`.claude/policies/` and `.claude/team_chat/`)
- [ ] Skills (`.claude/skills/`)
- [ ] Agents (`.claude/agents/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`README`, `GETTING_STARTED`, `docs/`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project's style guide
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with Claude Code
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, credentials, or local file paths are included
- [ ] All internal file paths use forward slashes and are relative (not absolute)
- [ ] Breaking changes include a migration guide in this PR description
